property_details.address: Casse Ghoon Road, Pointe aux Canonniers, 30525 Grand Baie, Mauritius
property_details.description: Experience an unforgettable culinary journey, where Chef Lou creates refined, exclusive dishes using fresh, local ingredients, a highlight of your stay. To enjoy this exceptional dining experience, simply check with the chef upon arrival. After indulging in gourmet cuisine, relax in your spacious 2-bedroom apartment, complete with private bathrooms, a shared pool, and a serene terrace.
property_details.space:
Inside, you’ll find two comfortable bedrooms, each with its own ensuite bathroom, providing privacy and comfort for all guests. The apartment’s warm, rustic design flows through the living area, which features a cosy outdoor TV lounge and a bright dining space, perfect for relaxing, sharing moments, or enjoying meals. The fully equipped kitchen allows you to prepare your own dishes if you wish, or you can delight in a tailored culinary experience with Chef Lou, crafted to your preferences.

Your private terrace opens to a tranquil outdoor space ideal for morning coffee, evening drinks, or simply unwinding. Just a few steps away, enjoy the shared swimming pool surrounded by lush greenery, offering a peaceful retreat. Air conditioning, high-speed Wi-Fi, and free on-site parking ensure a comfortable and effortless stay.
property_details.parking:
Where to park the car:
Each apartment has its own secure parking space inside the premises.

Access:
To enter the parking area, please use the gate code 1368#.

Street parking:
Allowed, but not recommended.
property_details.guest_access:
Guests have full private access to the apartment and its terrace. You’ll also enjoy shared access to the residence’s swimming pool and garden area.
For a unique dining experience, the on-site restaurant can prepare meals on request, exclusively for guests. Simply check with the staff during your stay to arrange a menu with the chef.

The pool area is shared with a few other apartments, but the atmosphere remains peaceful and respectful. Private parking is available on site, and our team is always nearby to assist or share local recommendations.
